fixes_applied.desc: Added export const ROWS=6 and COLS=6 at lines 6-7 to fix GameScene.js ES module import failure. Fix was applied during audio-qa run; stale blocker confirmed resolved in repair-loop pass.
fixes_applied.verified_by: grep 'export const ROWS\|export const COLS' canvas2d-client/www/src/game/TileGrid.js → lines 6-7 both present

non_issues_confirmed.reason: QA test had wrong expectations. Code is correct per spec: combo2→1.5x, combo3→2.0x, combo4→3.0x. All COMBO-* cases now pass (10/10).
BFS-6 expected _findPath to check tile types, but _findPath is geometry-only by design. All BFS-* cases pass (13/13).
